tool_bindings.name: get_run_context
tool_bindings.description: Read bounded context slices for the current AgentRun.

tool_bindings.name: search_web
tool_bindings.description: Search public web sources through the configured search plugin.

tool_bindings.name: get_account_context
tool_bindings.description: Read authorized account, policy, broker mode, and recent activity summaries.

tool_bindings.name: evaluate_thesis
tool_bindings.description: Evaluate evidence quality, materiality, novelty, prior coverage, confidence, and risk.

tool_bindings.name: build_action_plan
tool_bindings.description: Build a risk-controlled ActionPlan from analysis, evaluation, and account context IDs.

tool_bindings.name: submit_action_plan
tool_bindings.description: Submit an ActionPlan to policy, approval, notification, monitor, and broker mock/dry-run orchestration.
